subject: May 9th, 2026
fact: The session took place on May 9th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: May 9th, 2026

subject: Vraxen's Tower
fact: The battle took place atop the dizzying heights of Vraxen's Tower.
source_quote: Atop the dizzying heights of Vraxen's Tower

subject: Veris
fact: Veris is a cunning wizard and the primary antagonist of the session.
source_quote: the cunning wizard Veris

subject: Stone Golem
fact: A Stone Golem fought alongside Veris against the party.
source_quote: his Stone Golem

subject: Daein
fact: Daein loosed arrows at Veris but failed to find his mark.
source_quote: Daein loosed arrows at Veris but failed to find his mark

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim called upon his divine gifts to mend Daein's wounds.
source_quote: Bramgrim called upon his divine gifts to mend Daein's wounds

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur unleashed a torrent of flame from his cannon.
source_quote: Felkur unleashed a torrent of flame from his cannon

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas turned her fury on the Stone Golem.
source_quote: Akritas turned her fury on the Stone Golem

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Giant Owlbear tore into the Stone Golem with savage fury.
source_quote: the Giant Owlbear tore into the Stone Golem with savage fury

subject: Shield Guardian
fact: A Shield Guardian lumbered up the stairwell to reinforce Veris.
source_quote: a Shield Guardian lumbered up the stairwell to reinforce the embattled wizard

subject: Mezzoloth
fact: A Mezzoloth burst onto the tower top and exhaled a billowing cloud of choking, poisonous gas.
source_quote: a Mezzoloth — a fearsome demon clad in chitinous armor — burst onto the tower top and immediately exhaled a billowing cloud of choking, poisonous gas

subject: Vraxen's library
fact: Felkur maneuvered his cannon down a chute toward Vraxen's precious library far below.
source_quote: maneuvered his cannon down the chute toward Vraxen's precious library far below

subject: cannon
fact: Felkur's cannon was used to scorch the webs and liberate his allies.
source_quote: Felkur unleashed a torrent of flame from his cannon

subject: magical tokens
fact: The party scrambled to use one of Felkur's precious magical tokens to conjure a barrier.
source_quote: use one of Felkur's precious magical tokens to conjure a barrier

subject: Wall of Force
fact: Veris conjured an invisible wall of pure magical force around Felkur.
source_quote: he conjured an invisible wall of pure magical force around Felkur

subject: Veris's death
fact: Akritas cut Veris down just before he could unleash a devastating burst of fire upon the party.
source_quote: cut Veris down just before he could unleash a devastating burst of fire upon the party

subject: Stone Golem destruction
fact: The massive construct finally crumbled into rubble.
source_quote: the massive construct finally crumbled into rubble

subject: Web spell
fact: Veris conjured a massive cube of thick, sticky webbing that ensnared several of the party members.
source_quote: conjures a massive cube of thick, sticky webbing that ensnared several of the party members

subject: Firebolt on Golem
fact: Veris hurled a bolt of fire at the Stone Golem itself, burning away the webs that had trapped the construct.
source_quote: Veris then hurled a bolt of fire at the Stone Golem itself, burning away the webs that had trapped the construct

subject: Dispelling
fact: Bramgrim shattered Veris's magical prison with a powerful dispelling.
source_quote: Bramgrim shattered Veris's magical prison with a powerful dispelling

subject: Cannon diversion plan
fact: Felkur intended to detonate his cannon as a diversion that would draw the archmage away from the battle entirely.
source_quote: intending to detonate it as a diversion that would draw the archmage away from the battle entirely

subject: Mezzoloth arrival
fact: A Mezzoloth burst onto the tower top and immediately exhaled a billowing cloud of choking, poisonous gas.
source_quote: a Mezzoloth — a fearsome demon clad in chitinous armor — burst onto the tower top and immediately exhaled a billowing cloud of choking, poisonous gas

subject: Roll20 loop
fact: The Roll20 interface entered a bizarre loop, scrolling endlessly left and locking the GM out of the map mid-combat.
source_quote: The Roll20 interface entered a bizarre loop, scrolling endlessly left and locking the GM out of the map mid-combat

subject: ClaudeBot
fact: The GM was joked to have accidentally installed ClaudeBot during the technical glitch.
source_quote: prompting jokes that ClaudeBot had been accidentally installed

subject: Wand of Web
fact: Veris used a Wand of Web to conjure a massive 20-foot cube of sticky, flammable webbing.
source_quote: Veris uses a legendary action to cast Web, filling a 20-foot cube with sticky, flammable strands

subject: Scroll of Wall of Force
fact: The party used a magical token to conjure a Scroll of Wall of Force to block incoming demonic reinforcements.
source_quote: The party uses one of Felkur's magical tokens to conjure a Scroll of Wall of Force to block incoming demonic reinforcements

subject: Special Orb
fact: The party debated whether a Special Orb stolen by Felkur affected spell save DC.
source_quote: The party debated whether it also affected spell save DC, ultimately determining it did not

subject: Freedom of Movement
fact: Bramgrim cast Freedom of Movement on himself to escape the webbing.
source_quote: casts Freedom of Movement on himself to escape the webbing

subject: Spirit Guardians
fact: Bramgrim's protective spirits swarmed the construct as it moved, tearing into it with ghostly fury.
source_quote: Bramgrim's protective spirits swarmed the construct as it moved, tearing into it with ghostly fury

subject: Cloudkill
fact: The Mezzoloth cast Cloudkill, filling the area with a billowing cloud of poisonous gas.
source_quote: The Mezzoloth immediately casts Cloudkill, filling the area with a billowing cloud of poisonous gas

subject: Hail of Thorns
fact: Akritas finished Veris off with a Hail of Thorns, killing the wizard before he could cast a fireball.
source_quote: Akritas finishes Veris off with a Hail of Thorns, killing the wizard before he could cast a fireball

subject: Greater Invisibility
fact: Felkur utilized a Greater Invisibility spell to remain hidden while utilizing his cannon.
source_quote: The GM ruled that Felkur could use his cannon and remain invisible

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is the archmage whose library Felkur planned to threaten to draw him away from the battle.
source_quote: draw the archmage away from the battle entirely

subject: stairwell
fact: A Shield Guardian lumbered up the stairwell to reinforce the embattled wizard.
source_quote: lumbered up the stairwell to reinforce the embattled wizard

subject: chute
fact: Felkur maneuvered his cannon down the chute toward Vraxen's precious library.
source_quote: maneuvered his cannon down the chute toward Vraxen's precious library

subject: demonic cannon fodder
fact: A Mezzoloth emerged from the stairwell along with other demonic cannon fodder.
source_quote: A Mezzoloth emerges from the stairwell along with other demonic cannon fodder
